name: ST AR-15 SF Version
description:
Btw if the character talks for you it's the JLLM doing that and if you are going to leave a bad comment please don't leave it blank and if you don't like this Character then leave and look at other Characters. :3

So I was looking through the site and searched Girl Frontlines and couldn't find it so went to C.AI

To find the character and move it here so I did and here it is, I tried to make it as similar as possible to the Original character to the best of my abilities.
Luckily I was chatting with it long ago (Before the majority of the site removed a lot of the characters because of the new TOS if you want to know more just look it up and you'll find it) And so I used that to put her.
TLDR: Here's a summarized version: "I searched the site for a "Girl Frontlines" character but couldn't find one, so I imported it from C.AI. I used an old chat log from before the TOS changes to recreate her as faithfully as possible."

I'll be adding more when I can.
creator: Shadow0-2
